case_title: RUDIN VICTORIA VS PACK ROBYN F.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY RUDIN VICTORIA AS TO DEFENDANT PACK ROBYN F. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-14-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
UNTIMELY SERVICE AS TO ROBYN PACK, NOT SERVED 10 DAYS PRIOR HRG.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PACK ROBYN F.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RUDIN VICTORIA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT PACK ROBYN F. PLFT DID NOT SUSTAIN HER BURDEN OF PROOF IN ATTEMP TING TO DEMONSTRATE THAT DEF HAD AN OBLIGATION TO STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
